Product Description: Liquitex Professional Spray Paint

Unlike regular sprays, it uses low-odor professional paint made with water-based technology and low solvents. Perfect for the studio. *Fluorescent and metallic pigments are naturally less lightfast.

This medium viscosity paint is made with lightfast, artist-quality pigments in an expanded choice of colors.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Professional Watercolour
Product Information: Our Professional Watercolour range offers bright, vibrant colours and unrivalled performance. Watercolour, more than any other medium, reflects the unique characteristics of the pigments used and our Professional Watercolours use only the finest pigments, and are known for their brilliance, permanence and strength of colour. The transparency of our Professional Watercolour is achieved by our unique process of pigment dispersion during manufacture. The natural characteristics of each pigment highlights the paint’s transparency level.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Cotman Watercolour
Product Information: Fine Art Pigments Cotman Watercolours uses fine art pigments with reduced pigment load than the Professional Watercolour range, making them an accessible choice while still uncompromising on quality.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Griffin Alkyd Fast Drying Oil
Product Information: Traditional oils, wonderful as they are, take a very long time to dry. That's why we created our Griffin Alkyds - they dry much more quickly and this means impasto and glazing techniques can be done in a single session.These oil tones have a slightly greater level of transparency for increased depth and clarity when glazing. Our Griffins are a bit more fluid in consistency than traditional oils and they dry with a somewhat more reflective surface, too.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Cotman Watercolor Set - Compact Set
Product Information: Discover 14 Cotman Watercolours made with quality, fine art pigments. This set is ideal for outdoor use as it includes a brush and palettes with multiple mixing areas. Field Set was previously named The Compact Set.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Cotman Watercolor Set - Field Travel Set
Product Information: Discover 12 Cotman Watercolours made with quality, fine art pigments in a travel set. This set is ideal for outdoor watercolour painting, especially for extensive colour mixing. The Field Travel Set opens up to reveal a travel brush, 60mL water bottle, 2 clip-on water pots, and 3 palettes with mutliple mixing areas. Field Travel Set previously named Field Plus.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Oil Brushes Artists Hog Brushes Bright

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Oil Brushes Artists Hog Brushes Flat

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Oil Brushes Artists Hog Brushes Round

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Oil Brushes Artists Hog Brushes Filbert

The bristles’ natural curve is retained even after heavy use, allowing more control and accuracy, whether painting with oils or acrylics.

Filbert has a flat head with an oval tip for creating a broad mark with a soft edge.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Acrylic Brushes Galeria Long Handle Flat

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Acrylic Brushes University Series 233 Round
Product Information: University is a range of white synthetic general-purpose brushes. Featuring distinctive red handles with white tips, University Brushes are stiff enough to use with more fluid oils yet soft enough to use with watercolours. Additionally, when used with oils and acrylics, brush marks are not as visible. University brushes offer excellent spring controllability and will last a considerable length of time if properly cared for. They offer an affordable option for students or those looking for a multi-purpose brush.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Promarker
Product Information: Twin-tipped, for greater flexibility Winsor & Newton Promarker comes with a high-quality broad chisel nib for broad strokes to shade larger areas, and a fine bullet tip for precision.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Promarker Brush
Product Information: The Winsor & Newton Promarker Brush provides the ultimate in precise and flexible line control, adding versatility to your drawing and illustration practice. The colour rich range is highly blendable and offers print quality, streak-free coverage. Colour ranging from subtle pastels to bold, vibrant hues.Blend-friendly,with malleable, alcohol-based, translucent ink.Twin-tipped, with a broad chisel nib and brush nib.High quality nibs for print-quality, streak-free coverage.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Promarker Watercolour
Product Information: You won't find another marker quite like these ones - we decided to get creative and make watercolour in pen form. Blending varies depending on the paper you use, but they're designed to make gorgeous washes when combined with water. Because they have dual nibs, you can also use them for fine detail and sweeping line thicknesses. To see them at their best, always use them with our Winsor & Newton watercolour paper.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Promarker Neon
Product Information: Promarker Neon offers brilliant, fluorescent colours in high quality water-based ink. Pigmented and lightfast, it is perfect for adding vibrant highlights, definition and texture to your designs. It also glows under UV light. Each pen is twin-tipped, with a broader bullet nib suitable for filling in large areas, and a smaller one for detailed work.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Promarker Metallic
Product Information: Promarker Metallic offers intense, shimmery colours, perfect for adding highlights and texture to your designs. The pigment-based ink used is lightfast enough to provide long-lasting results. Each pen is twin-tipped, with a broader bullet nib suitable for filling in large areas, and a smaller one for detailed work.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Promarker Watercolour Collection
Product Information: Promarker Watercolour offers all the attributes of watercolour paint, but in a twin-tipped marker with a flexible brush-tip and a fine point. The water based pigmented ink in these markers allow you to create beautiful painterly effects when mixed with water. And thanks to the high quality pigments, your work will not fade. Perfect and convenient for creating gorgeous, expressive artworks on the go. For best results, use them on Winsor & Newton watercolour paper. Store horizontally.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Promarker Collection
Product Information: Explore the extensive Promarker colour spectrum with this 24-strong colour kit. As with all Promarker sets, it has been specifically curated to provide illustrators and artists with beautiful colours, every day. Please Note: Both sets pictured here contain the same colours. The markers in each set contain the same alcohol based dye ink.

These 12 vibrant colours were specifically curated to complement each other and broaden your colour collection.

Brilliantly versatile and responsive, these high-quality pencils are also perfect for spontaneous sketching, allowing you to quickly capture movement and try out new ideas.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Sketching Pencil Set with Eraser 5 Pieces

Available in a blister, perfect for students and beginners.

Product Description: Winsor & Newton Professional Watercolour Paper Cold Press 300gsm
Product Information: Rough paper has a pronounced tooth for achieving watercolours paintings with the most texture and granulation effects. All of our watercolour papers are designed to withstand saturation, and this gummed block keeps the paper stretched as it dries. The finished piece is then removed free from any buckling. Each block contains 20 sheets of 300gsm paper.
